description: Cleaned plaintext transcripts from official Burke Holland / VS Code YouTube videos on Copilot customization. Raw VTT auto-captions were processed with community-cache-clean-transcript.sh to strip timing data, inline tags, and duplicate lines, then reflowed into natural paragraphs.

transcripts.title: The complete guide to Agent Skills in VS Code
keyInsights: Skills are progressively loaded — only name+description go into system prompt; full content loaded on demand
Skills can bundle scripts, templates, and markdown files via relative path references
Use skills when you need to teach the agent a new capability beyond general instructions
Instructions = every prompt context, Prompts = reusable short prompts, Agents = modified agent workflows, Skills = everything else (domain knowledge, tool bundles)

transcripts.title: The Ultimate Agent Mode Tutorial in VS Code: Vision, MCP, Custom Agents & More!
keyInsights: Agent mode can run terminal commands, edit files, and chain multi-step workflows autonomously
Custom agents (.agent.md) can restrict tools and set specific model preferences
Vision capability allows agents to process screenshots for UI debugging
MCP servers extend agent capabilities with external tool integrations

transcripts.title: Ask, Edit, & Agent - In-depth Overview of GitHub Copilot Chat Modes
keyInsights: Ask mode is read-only — references files but makes no changes
Edit mode can modify files but does not run terminal commands
Agent mode has full autonomy — file edits, terminal, tool use
Instructions files (.github/copilot-instructions.md) are injected into the system prompt for every interaction

transcripts.title: Level Up Your VS Code Productivity (Mastering AI Workflows)
keyInsights: Prompt files (.prompt.md) are reusable slash commands that can reference other files
Instructions files provide persistent project context without manual attachment
Combining prompt files with instructions creates powerful repeatable workflows
Custom agents enable team-specific workflows with enforced tool boundaries
